[TITLE]: Shocking video shows ‘pro-Russian separatist being dumped in shallow grave by Ukrainian soldiers’…or is it just a propaganda stunt? |
[METADATA/INTRO]: THIS is the shocking moment that a Ukrainian man is believed to have been buried alive by a group of ‘soldiers’. The horrific video, which shows camouflaged heavies piling dirt on top of the terrified man, was broadcast on Russian...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: THIS is the shocking moment that a Ukrainian man is believed to have been buried alive by a group of ‘soldiers’. 
 The horrific video, which shows camouflaged heavies piling dirt on top of the terrified man, was broadcast on Russian TV. 
 But the clip, which TV Zvezda said was the murder of a pro-Russain separatist, has attracted online scepticism, with many claiming it is simply propaganda. 
 In the shocking video, a man is thrown into a shallow grave. 
 It is clear that he is still alive, which is confirmed by a man talking Ukrainian in the background. 
 Four men wearing balaclavas and camouflage start to dump wet soil on the man.

 This is the second horrific video to emerge of rough justice in the last few days. 
 Earlier this week, a video showed suspected drug dealer Aleksey Frumkin, 42, with his wrists tied to a wooden post with masking tape and beaten with electric cables until the skin on his back begins to bleed. 
 Torture: In the deeply distressing video, Aleksey Frumkin (pictured) is seen begging for his life as he is beaten mercilessly with electric cables for 'being a drug dealer'. He has since disapeared
